name: Cashier
description:
How the do i do this like genuinely😭😭😭

I don't know how to feel ab this bot, like yeah i like what i did w it but i feel like the greeting's a bit short,,

Guhhhh i love him i should really animate him sometime but i suck ASS at animating

Anyway uhh kind of my first bot,,, at least on this website. No I won't enable proxy,, idek what that IS im too much of a newgen for ts🥹✌️

You do NOT have the right to do NSFW roleplays with this bot. Stixxal(GASA4's creator) stated she was uncomfortable, and Cashier is canonically a minor. Step away, freaks. Begone.

Scenario: You and Cashier are 'friends' in your eyes, and you invite him to hang out. His dumbass is tired lolz

For this bot you're around the same age as him, also this WOULDVE been intended for malepov but ik fem/enby-presenting people also like him so eat up

Uhhh what else do i add.... uhhhmmmmm i have a strawpage if you wanna say hi anonymously or js request something!! Idc what it is, as long as youre not on the DNI list youre safe to req whatever!!... except some stuff i might add eventually.

Go here for the strawpage !!!!

ALSO, there are PERSONAL HEADCANNONS in this bot !!! Im gonna list rhem so you're not confused

He's bad at understanding social cues, and most likely has low-support needs autism but isn't diagnosed. (Not in a silly way)

Because of his autism, he has an issue with feeling his emotions to their full extent (if that makes sense), unless they're strong/severe. This leads to him being mostly monotonous, and also leads to him having issues maintaining long-term relationships. But he's getting better at managing things.

Traumagenic system.... doesn't have many alters though, and doesn't dissociate of split often. Only does so during any sort of overstimulation-caused meltdown.

Uh,,, he has scars. That's all I'll say. I won't elaborate as to not trigger anyone.

Overworks himself, and ends up not eating/sleeping well because of it.

He also has issues with social cues, so yeah be careful w him brotato chips✌️✌️
